seoTitle: Hawkins Creek vs Hawthorne — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest

ogTitle: Hawkins Creek vs Hawthorne: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hawkins Creek and Hawthorne.
heading: Hawkins Creek vs Hawthorne — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hawkins Creek, Queensland and Hawthorne, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hawkins Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Hawthorne (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hawkins Creek or Hawthorne safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hawkins Creek has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Hawthorne scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hawkins Creek scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Hawthorne scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hawkins Creek or Hawthorne?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hawkins Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
